name: Gotenberg
description: Gotenberg is a developer-friendly, Docker-powered API for converting documents to PDF. It uses Chromium for HTML/URL/Markdown-to-PDF conversion and LibreOffice for Office document conversion. It can also merge multiple PDFs. Gotenberg is typically self-hosted; the base_url should be replaced with your own instance URL.

auth.note: Gotenberg is self-hosted and has no built-in authentication. If your instance is behind a reverse proxy with API key or Basic auth configured, add the appropriate Authorization header. The base_url 'https://api.gotenberg.dev' is a placeholder; replace it with your own instance URL (e.g., 'http://localhost:3000').

capabilities.name: convert_html_to_pdf
capabilities.description: Convert one or more HTML files to a PDF document using the Chromium rendering engine.

capabilities.name: convert_url_to_pdf
capabilities.description: Convert a web page at a given URL to a PDF document using the Chromium rendering engine.

capabilities.name: convert_markdown_to_pdf
capabilities.description: Convert Markdown content to a PDF document, rendered within an HTML wrapper using Chromium.

capabilities.name: convert_office_to_pdf
capabilities.description: Convert Office documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.) to PDF using LibreOffice.

capabilities.name: merge_pdfs
capabilities.description: Merge multiple PDF files into a single PDF document.

capabilities.name: get_health
capabilities.description: Check the health status of the Gotenberg instance and its Chromium and LibreOffice modules.
